title: The Academy expands international film eligibility, addresses AI in new rules
description: The Academy, the organisation behind the Oscars, has addressed the use of artificial intelligence in performances and scripts for the 2027 Academy Awards, apart from allowing an actor to be nominated for more than one performance in a single category
